task_id.description: Unique ID for this task instance (UUID)

trace_id.description: Propagated across the full chain - same value from entry point to final agent

parent_task_id.description: ID of the task that spawned this one, null if root

agent_target.description: Name of the agent this envelope is addressed to

goal.description: Plain-language description of what the agent must accomplish

input_artifacts.description: List of artifact keys to read from memory before starting

context_keys.description: Memory keys the agent should retrieve for context

output_artifact.description: The memory key the agent must write its primary output to on completion

hitl_threshold.description: Confidence below which the agent must escalate to human_liaison

hitl_mandatory.description: If true, always route through human_liaison regardless of confidence

timeout_seconds.description: Agent must emit a status update or complete within this window
